changelog:
Version 2.4.0 - Fixed Auto-Update & North Arrow

✅ FIXED AUTO-UPDATE:
• Completely rewritten update system
• Better error handling and logging
• Proper file path detection
• User-Agent headers to avoid rate limiting
• Improved download progress tracking
• No automatic restart (user must restart manually)
• Creates backup before updating

✅ SIMPLE NORTH ARROW:
• Replaced full compass with simple north arrow
• Just an arrow pointing up with 'N' label
• Cleaner, simpler design
• Rotates with object controls

✅ ALL PREVIOUS FEATURES:
• Top-down realistic vehicles
• Complete PDF export with diagram
• Working scrollbar
• No emojis on buttons
• Maximized canvas
• Collapsible sections
